text: The patient was placed supine and the intercostal spaces were marked.
A six centimeter right thoracotomy was created at the third intercostal space and the robotic ports were placed at the second, fourth, and fifth spaces.
Femoral VA ECMO was initiated in the standard fashion with good hemodynamics and the robot was docked.
Robotic hyaluronid dissection was started at the superior pulmonary vein to facilitate ligation with the robotic vascular stapler.
